tasks.label: CMake: configure
tasks.detail: Generate the build system with the MSVC (VS 2022) generator. CMake locates cl.exe via vswhere — no vcvars needed, and the Strawberry MinGW/Ninja on PATH is ignored. First run downloads deps via FetchContent and is slow.

tasks.label: Build utsyn (Debug)
tasks.detail: Build only the utsyn executable (+ utsyn_core) in Debug.

tasks.label: Build utsyn (Release)
tasks.detail: Build only the utsyn executable (+ utsyn_core) in Release.

tasks.label: Build all (Debug)
tasks.detail: Build every target incl. plugin_example. Requires plugins/example_plugin/ExamplePlugin.cpp to exist.

tasks.label: CMake: clean
tasks.detail: Remove build artifacts (keeps the configured build tree).
